attio._comment: Attio CRM — companies, people, deals, tasks, notes

unipile._comment: Unipile — LinkedIn messaging, profiles, posts, connections

anysite._comment: Anysite — LinkedIn scraping, web data, YouTube, Reddit

notion._comment: Notion — search, fetch, create pages. Available via mcp__notion__* tools

slack._comment: Slack — channels, messages, search. Available via mcp__slack__* tools

ay-proposals._comment: AY Proposals MCP server — set AY_PROPOSALS_API_KEY in your environment or point MCP_CONFIG_PATH to a local config with the real token (do not commit secrets).
